## Problem

What should the tracker help you understand or automate?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the command, report, dashboard view, or integration you want.

## Alternatives

What do you use today, if anything?

## Privacy Notes

Would this feature need to read prompts, responses, local paths, or external billing APIs?
